vibe: Cinematic, moody, expensive feel. Heritage meets futuristic storytelling.

layout_and_spacing.philosophy: Generous spacing. Bento Grids for galleries. Asymmetry and cinematic overlapping.

surfaces_and_effects.textures: Grainy noise overlays using CSS or image on dark backgrounds to evoke analog film
surfaces_and_effects.borders: 1px solid #332A25 (soft warm border for dividing sections, not full boxes)

motion.hover: Subtle scale up (scale-105 for images), border color shift to #B26941
motion.scroll: Lenis smooth scroll is mandatory. Fade in up for content to simulate cinematic reveals.

components.nav: Sticky glassmorphism header, visible links on desktop
components.buttons: Flat background with copper accent, or outlined with text-[#B26941]. Hover state must be lighter copper.
components.cards: Cardless or minimalistic containers. Do not use standard Shadcn bordered cards. Opt for editorial layout (e.g., image top, text below with no borders, just generous spacing).
components.forms: Shadcn UI customized with #332A25 borders, #1A1614 backgrounds, and #B26941 focus rings

hero.alt: Cinematic sunset view of ferries on Istanbul's Bosphorus with a moody silhouette effect.
hero.usage: Hero section background with dark gradient overlay (bg-gradient-to-t from-[#0F0D0C] via-[#0F0D0C]/70 to-transparent)

about_profile.alt: Portrait of older man traveling with backpack
about_profile.usage: About section profile image. Make it tall (aspect-[3/4]) with subtle rounded corners.

gallery_travel.alt: People walking down sunlit narrow street
gallery_travel.title: Naples Episodes

gallery_ai.alt: Textured abstract art swirling brushstrokes sepia
gallery_ai.title: AI Art Exploration

texture.usage: Optional overlay as a low opacity (e.g., 5-10%) background texture across main sections for film grain look. Add pointer-events-none.

instructions_to_main_agent: Install and use `@fontsource/playfair-display` (or google fonts) for Headings and `@fontsource/outfit` for Body fonts.
Implement `lenis` for smooth scrolling. This is crucial for the cinematic feel.
Use `framer-motion` for staggering entrance animations on the gallery items and text reveals.

For the hero section, overlay a heavy gradient `bg-gradient-to-t from-[#0F0D0C] via-[#0F0D0C]/60 to-transparent` over the image to ensure the text (H1: 'Racconto il mondo attraverso persone, luoghi e intelligenza artificiale') is readable.
Do NOT use generic Shadcn Card components without heavy customization. Make them look editorial (border-b only, or bento grid style with big photos).
Navigation must be visible on desktop, no hamburger until mobile.
Include specific sections: Hero, About (Chi Sono - ex supermarket director turned creator, 'Il giro del mondo in...'), Projects/Series Gallery, AI Prompts Blog, Contact Form.
Make heavy use of wide gaps (gap-8, gap-12) and negative space.
Social links (Instagram, TikTok, Facebook) should be elegantly placed in header/footer.
The Contact form must look premium: bottom border inputs only (border-b) instead of full boxed inputs, or subtly filled dark inputs.
